data.content: Shipment complete. Merged feat/foolery-d8cb-audit-page to main (merge commit b411e0ab1ced, feature commit d6e4b0ff49e6). All quality gates passed: 0 lint errors, no type errors, 2212 tests passed. Pushed to origin/main. CI green (run 23432090354). Changes: replaced 'Total Claims' with 'Completed' (successes+failures) in summary cards and agent rows; rewrote queue charts to show daily success rate percentages instead of raw count aggregations.
